headline: Ravens Regime: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Ravens Regime carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 80.09, led by Lamar Jackson, Tyler Warren, and Derrick Henry. The clearest lineup pressure point is the RB slot held by Kyle Monangai at 55.6 C-AVI.

recent_trades.summary: On July 15, Ravens Regime traded with Northside Kings and acquired Tyler Warren while sending RJ Harvey, Bhayshul Tuten, 2026 Round 2 (original roster 2). Tyler Warren is now the verified TE starter at 97.2 C-AVI and 90.5 D-AVI. The transaction moved out 1 draft asset, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks.

On July 14, Ravens Regime traded with Big Balder Brand and acquired Jameson Williams while sending George Kittle, 2026 Round 1 (original roster 1). Jameson Williams is now the verified WR starter at 79.9 C-AVI and 81.1 D-AVI. The transaction moved out 1 draft asset, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks.

On July 13, Ravens Regime traded with All Hail King Jesus and acquired Derrick Henry while sending Isiah Pacheco, 2026 Round 1 (original roster 13). Derrick Henry is now the verified RB starter at 92.8 C-AVI and 83.9 D-AVI. The transaction moved out 1 draft asset, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Lamar Jackson (97.2), Tyler Warren (97.2), and Derrick Henry (92.8).

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Kyle Monangai is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 55.6. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 9 offensive players, with 1 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 80.34.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 9 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
